scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "cargo run --manifest-path apps/server/Cargo.toml" "npm run dev -w @operalibre/web"
scripts.build: cargo build --manifest-path apps/server/Cargo.toml && npm run build -w @operalibre/web
scripts.typecheck: cargo check --manifest-path apps/server/Cargo.toml && npm run typecheck -w @operalibre/web
